assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 3: '## Repository Registry', line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |', line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'. Both repositories listed with correct Serena instance names.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 10: '## Jira Configuration', line 12: 'Project key: TC', line 13: 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', line 14: 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', line 15: 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', line 16: 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'. All 5 fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 18: '## Code Intelligence', line 20: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' The naming convention is explicitly documented with an example call on lines 24-28.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 30: '### Limitations'. This appears after '## Code Intelligence' (line 18) and before '## Bug Configuration' (line 34), correctly nested under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-14: 'Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances', source: 'MCP tool listing', discovery method: 'Scanned for tools matching the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming pattern', discovered instances: 'serena_backend — 10 tools' and 'serena_ui — 10 tools'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all Project Configuration sections (Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, Bug Configuration) were newly added — pre-existing non-configuration content from the CLAUDE.md (like the project heading and Documentation section) may appear as preserved, which is expected since only Project Configuration was missing
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 3: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration section. All sections below were newly added.' Each section explicitly marked 'Status: Added (new)': Repository Registry (line 14), Jira Configuration (line 22), Code Intelligence (line 31), Bug Configuration (line 36). Lines 49-51: 'The original CLAUDE.md content (project heading, Documentation section, Getting Started section) was preserved without modification.'

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |'. All 4 required columns are present in the correct order.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 34: '## Bug Configuration', line 36: 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', line 37: 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', line 38: 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All 3 fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 63-65: 'Step 10 — Security Configuration / User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project. / Section not created.' changes-log.md lines 57-58 confirms: 'Security Configuration / Reason: User declined when asked whether to enable security triage.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (the file ends at line 43 with Hierarchy Configuration).
